name: OpenAI
description: OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company whose mission is to ensure artificial general intelligence benefits all of humanity. Developers of ChatGPT, GPT-4o, Sora, and DALL-E 3.

name: NVIDIA
description: NVIDIA is the dominant AI infrastructure company producing GPUs that power virtually all AI training. Its H100 and Blackwell chips are the foundation of the AI revolution.

name: Anthropic
description: Anthropic is an AI safety company building reliable, interpretable AI systems. Founded by ex-OpenAI researchers, it develops the Claude series and pioneered Constitutional AI.

name: Google DeepMind
description: Google DeepMind merges two world-class AI research teams to advance AI safety and scientific discovery. Home of Gemini Ultra, AlphaFold 3, and robotics research.

name: Microsoft
description: Microsoft is the world's largest AI-enabled software company through its $13B OpenAI partnership. Azure AI, Copilot, and GitHub Copilot are reshaping enterprise productivity.

name: SpaceX
description: SpaceX is revolutionizing space transportation with reusable rockets and Starship — the most powerful rocket ever built. Starlink provides global satellite internet to 3M+ users.

name: Palantir
description: Palantir builds AI-powered data intelligence platforms for government and enterprise. Its AIP platform is accelerating AI deployment in defense, intelligence, and commercial sectors.

name: Anduril Industries
description: Anduril builds autonomous defense systems powered by Lattice AI OS. Founded by tech veterans, it's redefining modern warfare with AI-enabled autonomous weapons and drones.

name: Databricks
description: Databricks is the Data + AI company providing a unified platform for data engineering and ML. Its DBRX open model and MosaicML acquisition position it as the enterprise AI data leader.

name: Scale AI
description: Scale AI provides the data infrastructure powering AI development with high-quality training data. Its RLHF and Government divisions serve OpenAI, Anthropic, and the US Department of Defense.

name: Mistral AI
description: Mistral AI is Europe's leading AI company, building efficient open-weight models that rival GPT-4. Known for performance-per-compute efficiency and Apache 2.0 licensing.

name: CrowdStrike
description: CrowdStrike is the AI-native cybersecurity leader protecting endpoints, cloud workloads, and identities. Its Falcon platform processes 2 trillion security events per week using AI.

name: Groq
description: Building the world's fastest AI inference chips — LPU (Language Processing Unit) architecture delivers 10x speed and 10x lower cost than GPU-based inference. Making real-time AI accessible.

name: Cerebras
description: Creator of the world's largest chip — the Wafer Scale Engine. A single Cerebras system replaces thousands of GPUs for AI training, with radical simplicity and energy efficiency.

name: Together AI
description: Open-source AI cloud platform enabling researchers and companies to train, fine-tune, and deploy open models at scale. Fastest growing open AI inference platform globally.

name: Runway
description: Pioneering generative AI for video and visual storytelling. Gen-3 Alpha creates cinematic-quality video from text prompts, redefining filmmaking, advertising, and creative production.

name: Midjourney
description: Self-funded AI art powerhouse generating stunning images from text descriptions. V6 model produces photorealistic imagery rivaling professional photography and illustration.

name: Perplexity
description: AI-powered answer engine disrupting traditional search. Combines real-time web search with large language models to deliver instant, sourced, and accurate answers to complex queries.

name: Character.AI
description: Platform for creating and chatting with AI characters, achieving massive consumer engagement. Pioneering personalized AI companions with emotional intelligence and persistent memory.

name: Figure AI
description: Building the world's first commercially viable general-purpose humanoid robot. Figure 02 integrates OpenAI vision-language models for natural human interaction and autonomous task completion.

name: Wayve
description: UK-based autonomous driving startup using end-to-end learned driving models instead of hand-coded rules. AV2.0 approach generalizes across cities, vehicles, and conditions with minimal mapping.

name: Aleph Alpha
description: European sovereign AI champion building secure, GDPR-compliant large language models for government and enterprise. Luminous model family serves defense and critical infrastructure clients.

name: Sakana AI
description: Nature-inspired AI lab founded by ex-Google Brain researchers exploring evolutionary and swarm-intelligence approaches to building foundation models. Pioneering AI-generating-AI methods.

name: Poolside
description: Building the next frontier in AI-assisted software engineering. Training models specifically for code generation, debugging, and full-stack development with reinforcement learning from execution.

name: Magic AI
description: Building AI with ultra-long context windows exceeding 100M tokens. Magic's LTM (Long-Term Memory) architecture enables AI to reason over entire codebases, books, and organizational knowledge.

name: Replit
description: AI-native collaborative coding platform with millions of developers. Replit Agent can build and deploy full-stack applications from natural language, democratizing software development.

name: Transformer Architecture
description: Self-attention-based neural network architecture that has become the foundation for modern language models, vision models, and multimodal AI systems.

name: Quantum Error Correction
description: Techniques for protecting quantum information from errors due to decoherence and quantum noise, essential for building fault-tolerant quantum computers.

name: Solid-State Batteries
description: Next-generation battery technology using solid electrolytes instead of liquid, offering higher energy density, faster charging, and improved safety.

name: Neuromorphic Computing
description: Brain-inspired computing architecture that processes information using spiking neural networks, enabling ultra-low-power edge AI and real-time pattern recognition.

name: CRISPR Gene Editing
description: Precise genome editing tool enabling targeted modifications to DNA sequences. Revolutionizing medicine, agriculture, and biological research.

name: Fusion Energy
description: Clean energy technology that replicates the power of stars by fusing hydrogen atoms. Multiple startups approaching net energy gain with novel confinement approaches.
